vision.visual_reason: Illustration of the Yelp logo with stylized shopping bags, food items, and tools on a patterned background. No real venue, interior, or people depicted.
Overhead view of a spacious restaurant interior with open kitchen, exposed ductwork, weathered walls, wooden tables with place settings, and warm lighting, conveying an industrial-chic atmosphere.

Open kitchen pass with plated dishes in foreground and chefs working in background; shallow depth of field and tilted angle prevent use as a clean hero image, but conveys a busy, warm restaurant atmosphere.
Interior dining space with distressed plaster walls, exposed metal beams, warm track lighting, wooden tables, woven-seat chairs, and tropical plant decor, captured in sharp focus with no people.
Close-up overhead shot of a plated fish dish with Brussels sprouts on a white plate; wooden table surface and glassware partially visible but no venue space shown.
Nighttime exterior facade of a restaurant with illuminated entrance, visible interior through windows showing tables, chairs, and a chandelier, but a person is partially visible inside the doorway.
Close-up of a plated dish (broccolini with green sauce) dominates the frame with drinks and table visible; no clear view of the venue space.
Close-up of two plated desserts (chocolate mousse with meringue sticks) on a light table; the food fills the frame and no venue space is visible.
Close-up overhead shot of three plates with food (cheesy chicken, steak, mashed potatoes) on a plain table surface, no venue interior visible.
Close-up of a sushi platter in a black box dominates the frame; a small portion shows a table, placemat, plate, and a person's hands at the top, but the venue interior is not the focus.
Close-up of a sushi platter on a black tray dominating the frame; a teacup and chair back are visible in the background but the image is focused on the food.
Close-up of a plate of dumplings on a ceramic dish, with blurred tableware and a glass in the background; food product dominates the frame with no clear venue spatial context.
Close-up of breaded fried shrimp with sauce on a blue plate, accompanied by shredded purple cabbage, tomato, and greens. No venue interior or exterior visible.

Well-lit, empty restaurant interior with classic European décor: wood paneling, red tables, leather banquettes, chandeliers, framed art, and warm wall tones creating a cozy, traditional bistro atmosphere.

Clear interior view of a classic café/restaurant with wooden tables and chairs, parquet flooring, warm yellow walls, ornate chandeliers, decorative bust, wrought iron gate, and traditional detailing. Well-lit, sharp, and inviting.

Clear exterior facade of 'La Justina' with yellow walls, wrought-iron details, awning with Coca-Cola logo, chalkboard menus advertising 'LOCRO' and 'EMPANADAS', and a glass entrance showing a seated patron inside.

Interior seating area with burgundy leather armchairs, wooden round table, ornate display cabinet with porcelain, large arched windows, parquet wood flooring, and warm yellow walls bathed in natural light—classic traditional café/bodega atmosphere.
Close-up of food (kebabs, salad, bread), wine glasses, and hands; focus is on the meal and drinks, not the venue interior.

Interior shot dominated by a large crystal chandelier in the upper half, with restaurant seating and blue sofas visible below, but the framing and focus on the chandelier make it more of an atmospheric detail than a clear hero shot.
Close-up of a seared steak garnished with chives and coarse salt on a matte black plate; no venue interior, exterior, or people visible.
Close-up top-down shot of a plated dish (octopus with orange sauce and microgreens) on a dark plate, dark background; no venue space or context visible.
Clear exterior facade of 'Parrilla Sanabria' with dark painted wood paneling, exposed brick, large windows, wooden doors, and outdoor seating visible on sidewalk.

Close-up of a dessert sundae in a glass with ice cream, strawberries, wafers, and chocolate sauce dominates the frame. Background shows blurred interior and partial arm, but the dessert is the clear subject, not the venue space.
Well-lit restaurant interior with white-clothed tables, brown chairs, textured ceiling, large windows revealing nighttime street view, and warm wall sconces.
Close-up of a plated tiramisu-style dessert with chocolate sauce drizzle, wafer garnish, and piped cream on a white plate; no venue space visible.
Close-up of a grilled steak on a metal plate, a salad with tomatoes and onions, and a small bowl of condiment; no venue space or people visible.
Close-up overhead shot of plated food (grilled steak, fries, mashed potatoes, bread) on a table; no venue interior, spatial context, or identifiable people visible.
Close-up of grilled steaks on a metal plate with a partial view of a bowl and bottle; no venue interior or spatial context is shown.

Decorative glass storefront window with hand-painted 'La Cooqueta Parrilla' signage, Argentine flag motif, and chalkboard specials. The window's painted glass dominates the frame, though a partial view of the warm-lit interior with diners is visible through the glass.

Dimly lit parilla/wood-fired grill area with brick firebox, hanging grate, chains, and bags of charcoal below; menu on a wooden counter in foreground; no people, no food, dark and moody, not a clear hero shot.

Close-up of a steak and fries on a metal plate; no venue space or interior visible.

Close-up of a plate with pizza slices and thick-cut fries on an orange plate, with a patterned table and cutlery visible. No broader venue interior shown.

Rustic dining interior with exposed brick walls, warm amber lighting, decorative bottles on a high shelf, hanging dried fish, and tables with red patterned runners, creating a cozy, well-composed atmosphere.
